product.p_description: Meet the new iPhone 17. Designed with contoured edges, thinner borders and durable materials like Ceramic Shield 2 on the front, it looks — and stays — beautiful. You can see and do more of everything you love on a 15.93 cm (6.3″)

Meet the new iPhone 18. Designed with contoured edges, thinner borders and durable materials like Ceramic Shield 2 on the front, it looks — and stays — beautiful. You can see and do more of everything you love on a 15.93 cm (6.3″)
